news.title:
Time Technoplast Ltd signs MoU to acquire 76% stake in Systoverse Pvt Ltd for HDPE pipe expansion.
Acquisition aims to enhance TTL's market presence, leveraging SPL's facilities, tax benefits, and state subsidies.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast Ltd signs MoU to acquire 76% stake in Systoverse Pvt Ltd for HDPE pipe expansion.
Acquisition aims to enhance TTL's market presence, leveraging SPL's facilities, tax benefits, and state subsidies.

news.title:
Time Technoplast's subsidiary, PowerBuild Batteries, received CPRI certification, boosting utility battery market prospects.
Time Technoplast trades at ₹158/share, 36.5% below its 52-week high, with a P/E of 17.5 vs industry P/E of 20.6.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast's subsidiary, PowerBuild Batteries, received CPRI certification, boosting utility battery market prospects.
Time Technoplast trades at ₹158/share, 36.5% below its 52-week high, with a P/E of 17.5 vs industry P/E of 20.6.

news.title:
Bharat PET plans a Rs 760 crore IPO, including Rs 120 crore fresh issue and Rs 640 crore OFS by promoters.
Funds will support capex, debt repayment; competes with listed peers like Mold-Tek, Shaily, and Time Technoplast.
news.summary:
Bharat PET plans a Rs 760 crore IPO, including Rs 120 crore fresh issue and Rs 640 crore OFS by promoters.
Funds will support capex, debt repayment; competes with listed peers like Mold-Tek, Shaily, and Time Technoplast.

news.title:
Time Technoplast Ltd confirms timely repayment of commercial paper maturing on March 25, 2026.
The company had earlier fixed March 24, 2026, as the record date for repayment.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast Ltd confirms timely repayment of commercial paper maturing on March 25, 2026.
The company had earlier fixed March 24, 2026, as the record date for repayment.

news.title:
Time Technoplast completed greenfield, brownfield projects in Q4 FY26.
New plants in Gujarat, Tamil Nadu; Silvassa capacity now 150,000 IBCs p.a.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast completed greenfield, brownfield projects in Q4 FY26.
New plants in Gujarat, Tamil Nadu; Silvassa capacity now 150,000 IBCs p.a.

news.title:
Time Technoplast's subsidiary PowerBuild Batteries gains CPRI certification for OPzS Tubular batteries.
Certification covers 2V batteries of 10Ah, 20Ah, 300Ah, aiding utility sector procurements.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast's subsidiary PowerBuild Batteries gains CPRI certification for OPzS Tubular batteries.
Certification covers 2V batteries of 10Ah, 20Ah, 300Ah, aiding utility sector procurements.

news.title:
Time Technoplast secures PSU order for Type IV CNG cylinders and storage cascades.
Order supports CGD networks in India, to be executed within 1 year.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast secures PSU order for Type IV CNG cylinders and storage cascades.
Order supports CGD networks in India, to be executed within 1 year.

news.title:
Time Technoplast wins ₹115.6 Cr CNG cylinder order from a prominent PSU.
Order completion expected within a year, highlighting CNG market growth.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast wins ₹115.6 Cr CNG cylinder order from a prominent PSU.
Order completion expected within a year, highlighting CNG market growth.

news.title: Time Technoplast Ltd secures an order worth ₹1.16 billion.
news.summary: Time Technoplast Ltd secures an order worth ₹1.16 billion.

news.title:
Time Technoplast reports normal operations despite Middle East conflicts.
The company expects negligible impact on revenue or profit margins.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast reports normal operations despite Middle East conflicts.
The company expects negligible impact on revenue or profit margins.

news.title:
Time Technoplast sees polymer prices rise 20% in 45 days due to oil surge.
Middle East operations remain normal with minimal revenue impact despite conflicts.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast sees polymer prices rise 20% in 45 days due to oil surge.
Middle East operations remain normal with minimal revenue impact despite conflicts.

news.title:
Time Technoplast shares Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call transcript per Regulation 30.
Transcript link available on company website for investor access.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast shares Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call transcript per Regulation 30.

news.title:
Time Technoplast gets trial order via EPC contractor for Type IV Hydrogen Storage Systems.
Order is for a Navaratna PSU in energy sector, supporting Indian Armed Forces; delivery in 1 year.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast gets trial order via EPC contractor for Type IV Hydrogen Storage Systems.

news.title: Time Technoplast aims 15% revenue growth by FY26, focusing on composites, packaging.
news.summary: Time Technoplast aims 15% revenue growth by FY26, focusing on composites, packaging.

news.title:
Time Technoplast Ltd. posts strong quarterly results, showing revenue growth and margin expansion.
Improved cash flow and operational metrics position it well against historical and market benchmarks.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast Ltd. posts strong quarterly results, showing revenue growth and margin expansion.
Improved cash flow and operational metrics position it well against historical and market benchmarks.

news.title:
Time Technoplast's Q3 EBITDA rose to 2.33B rupees from 2B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.9% from 14.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast's Q3 EBITDA rose to 2.33B rupees from 2B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.9% from 14.5% YoY.

news.title:
Time Technoplast Ltd reported no deviation in fund utilization for QIP proceeds of Rs. 800 crore raised on Nov 11, 2025.
Funds were used for debt repayment, capital expenditure, and investments, with unutilized funds temporarily placed in fixed deposits.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast Ltd reported no deviation in fund utilization for QIP proceeds of Rs. 800 crore raised on Nov 11, 2025.
Funds were used for debt repayment, capital expenditure, and investments, with unutilized funds temporarily placed in fixed deposits.

news.title:
Time Technoplast Ltd has completed timely repayment of its commercial paper maturing on February 11, 2026.
The repayment was made as per SEBI guidelines, ensuring compliance and transparency.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast Ltd has completed timely repayment of its commercial paper maturing on February 11, 2026.
The repayment was made as per SEBI guidelines, ensuring compliance and transparency.

news.title:
Time Technoplast's subsidiary, PowerBuild Batteries, partners with Europe's Monbat AD for VRLA batteries.
Deal boosts 'Make in India', local jobs, and targets India's growing 3500-4000 crore battery market.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast's subsidiary, PowerBuild Batteries, partners with Europe's Monbat AD for VRLA batteries.
Deal boosts 'Make in India', local jobs, and targets India's growing 3500-4000 crore battery market.

news.title:
Time Technoplast Ltd confirms timely repayment of commercial paper maturing on February 2, 2026.
Record date for repayment was January 30, 2026, as earlier intimated by the company.
news.summary:
Time Technoplast Ltd confirms timely repayment of commercial paper maturing on February 2, 2026.
Record date for repayment was January 30, 2026, as earlier intimated by the company.
